zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla Stanton於1253年出生在英國史洛普爾斯坦頓 武朋 海因 希斯時，她的父親Stephen de Stanton23歲，母親Katherine Strange17歲。她於1273年與Thomas de la Lee在英國英格蘭史洛普爾斯坦頓 武朋 海因 希斯結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1332年之後。

nameMeanings.name: Stanton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

variants.name: Staunton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: Stainton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and northern England): habitational name from any of various places called Stainton, including Stainton by Langworth, Market Stainton, and Stainton le Vale (all Lincolnshire), Stainton Dale (North Yorkshire), and Stainton (Cumberland, Durham, Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Westmorland, Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire). The placenames derive either from Old Norse steinn ‘stone, rock’ or from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’, later replaced by Old Norse steinn, + Old English tūn. The name was probably sometimes confused with or absorbed by Stanton .

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla Stanton was born in 1253, in Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, her father, Stephen de Stanton, was 23 and her mother, Katherine Strange, was 17. She married Thomas de la Lee in 1273, in Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died after 1332.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronilla Stantonが1253年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ウプオン ヒン ヒースで生まれた時，父Stephen de Stantonは23歳，母Katherine Strangeは17歳であった。1273年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアスタントン ウプオン ヒン ヒースでThomas de la Leeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1332年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla Stanton(이)가 1253년 영국 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen de Stanton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Strange(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 스탠턴 업 이인 히스에서 Thomas de la Lee(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronilla Stanton nasceu em 1253, em Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen de Stanton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Strange, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de la Lee em 1273, em Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1332.

ru.Saint Andrew's Church, Stanton upon Hine: стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla Stanton родилась в 1253 г. в местности стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen de Stanton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Strange, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de la Lee в 1273 г. в местности стантон упон хаин хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла после 1332 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Petronilla Stanton nació en 1253, en Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen de Stanton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Katherine Strange, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Thomas de la Lee en 1273, en Stanton upon Hine Heath, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió después de 1332.
